CustomField.description: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. The sum of any amounts due from borrower beyond the Purchase Price and Settlement Charges to Borrower. The sum of lines 104-112 plus any amount in Line 102 (Personal Property) on the HUD-1. This field was added in 1.10 in order to improve the user process for entering amounts due.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The sum of any amounts due from borrower beyond the Purchase Price and Settlement Charges to Borrower. The sum of lines 104-112 plus any amount in Line 102 (Personal Property) on the HUD-1.
CustomField.label: Other Amounts Due from Buyer
